measurement_note: Size is n, the number of cities. Threshold 1 makes the divisor-multiple sweep traverse its harmonic workload, while each tier asks a representative connected query. The Accepted divisor-sieve union-find and an independent smallest-prime-factor union take O(n log n) time under the required bound. A correct implementation that checks every city pair with gcd takes O(n^2), completes all 40/160/640 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.
